name: ensembleworks
description: Multiplayer infinite-canvas team room: tldraw + tmux terminals + LiveKit spatial audio

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=server & npm run dev:term --workspace=server & npm run dev --workspace=client & wait
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=transcriber
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=client && npm run typecheck --workspace=server && npm run typecheck --workspace=transcriber
